# gotrippin

> gotrippin is a route-first trip planner. Plan together, without the chaos — build your route, invite others, and let AI suggest the rest. Ditch messy spreadsheets and endless group chats.

## Description

gotrippin helps travelers create and share trip itineraries. Key features: interactive route maps with drag-to-reorder stops; trip stops can carry **Google Places** metadata (e.g. place id, photos) when available; **Open-Meteo** supplies per-stop weather for trip dates (server-side); an **AI trip assistant** calls **validated server tools** (same rules as the REST API). Trips are **shared with authenticated members** (join link; optional **Brevo** transactional email when the API is configured). Primary writes go through **NestJS**; **Supabase** provides PostgreSQL (with **RLS**), Auth, Storage, and **Realtime** at the platform level—**peer edits are typically visible after navigation or refresh** unless a deployment wires Postgres change subscriptions into the UI.

## Links

- [Home](https://gotrippin.app/home): Landing page and product overview
- [Sign up / Log in](https://gotrippin.app/auth): Create account or sign in
- [Explore](https://gotrippin.app/explore): Browse and discover

## Contact

- [GitHub](https://github.com/dimitarpst/gotrippin)

## Optional

- Product: Web app for travel planning and itinerary management
- Target users: Travelers, groups planning trips together
- Tech: Next.js, NestJS, Supabase, Mapbox, Open-Meteo, OpenRouter (AI), Unsplash (covers), optional Brevo (invites)
